posts.title: Building Effective Agents on Dafthunk
posts.description: How Anthropic's agent patterns map onto the Dafthunk runtime. Prompt chaining, routing, parallelization, orchestrator and workers, evaluator and optimizer, and autonomous agents, each shown as a shape you draw on the canvas.
posts.tagline: Six patterns, one visual canvas, on the Cloudflare stack.
posts.author: The Dafthunk team
